module.name: infobox
module.description: A bordered, titled callout panel (note / tip / warning / danger); body = title section then content section.
module.aiSpec:
Call out important information in a bordered, titled panel — notes, tips, warnings, danger callouts. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->` into TWO sections — section 1 is the box title (header), section 2 is the body text (Markdown). Set `color` to signal intent (e.g. var(--warning-color) for a warning, var(--danger-color) for danger).
Parameters: - `color`: accent colour of the left border and header (any CSS colour; default var(--success-color)). - `icon`: optional emoji/symbol shown before the title (default none). - `accentfill` (true|false, default false): tint the box background and header with the accent colour instead of the neutral panel colours. - `border`: CSS width of the left accent bar (default 6px). - `radius`: CSS corner radius (default var(--radius-sm)).
Example: <!-- @infobox color: var(--warning-color), icon: ⚠️, accentfill: true --> Heads up <!-- @ --> This action cannot be undone. <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Accent Color
param.desc: Border and header colour of the box.

param.name: icon
param.label: Icon
param.desc: Optional emoji/symbol shown before the title.

param.name: accentfill
param.label: Accent fill
param.desc: Tint the box background/header with the accent colour.

param.name: border
param.label: Accent bar width
param.desc: CSS width of the left accent bar, e.g. 6px or 3px.

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius
param.desc: CSS corner radius; blank = theme default.

snippet.label: InfoBox
snippet.text: <!-- @infobox color: var(--success-color) --> Information <!-- @ --> Describe information here <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: WarningBox
snippet.text: <!-- @infobox color: var(--warning-color) --> Warning <!-- @ --> Describe warning here <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: DangerBox
snippet.text: <!-- @infobox color: var(--danger-color) --> Danger <!-- @ --> Describe error here <!-- @end -->
